task: Write a complete key-value store with get, set, delete, list, and persistence via file effect

tests.input: v s = KvStore.open("t.json"); s.set("a", "1"); s.delete("a"); s.get("a")

task: Write a complete markdown-to-HTML converter supporting headers, bold, italic, code blocks, and paragraphs
Write a task scheduler with priority queue, deadlines, and execution tracking

tests.input: v s = Scheduler.new(0); s.add("low", 1, 100); s.add("high", 10, 100); s.next().unwrap().name

task: Write a complete expression evaluator with variables, arithmetic, comparisons, and function calls
Write a simple HTTP router framework with path parameters, middleware support, and response builder

tests.input: v r = Router.new(); r.get("/hello/:name", fn(req,p) => Response.ok(f"hi {p["name"]}"); r.dispatch(&Request{method:"GET",path:"/hello/world",...}).body

task: Write a complete tokenizer/lexer generator that takes a list of regex patterns and produces a token stream
Write a complete event-sourced counter aggregate with event log, command handling, and state projection

tests.input: v s = EventStore.new(); handle_command(&!s, Command.Increment(5)); s.replay().value

task: Write a CSV parser and formatter with header support, field quoting, and row iteration
Write a state machine framework with named states, transitions, guards, and event processing
Write a dependency injection container with typed service registration, resolution, and singleton support

tests.input: v c = Container.new(); c.register("db", ServiceLifetime.Singleton, fn() => ^42); c.has("db")
